rationale: Improvement child of DRIVERS-907; addresses change stream resume behavior via spec-driven update.
Adding spec tests for hint with unacknowledged delete; child of DRIVERS-970, test-only improvement.
WriteConcernError errInfo object not propagated; spec requires passing errInfo through to caller.
ElectionInProgress should not be resumable per change stream spec; driver incorrectly included it.
GridFS index checking failed with shell-created indexes; spec-driven fix per DRIVERS-789.
Adding FLE corpus test from DRIVERS-686; test infrastructure work, not a driver behavior fix.
Documentation update for allowDiskUse server version requirement; no driver behavior change.
Spec clarifies RetryableWriteError label must not be added to errors on writes within a transaction.
Adding explain support for aggregate operation; API ergonomics improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Database::command() inherited read preference, violating Server Selection spec rule on command read preferences.
Documentation improvement for extension installation steps; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Documentation link and content update; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
CursorNotFound should be treated as resumable per change stream spec; child of DRIVERS-1308.
DropCollection not handling NamespaceNotFound error code; implementation bug, no specific spec rule cited.
GridFS stream_copy_to_stream return value not checked; PHP API error handling bug, not a spec rule violation.
Creating Evergreen CI matrix; build/CI infrastructure work with no spec involvement.
GridFS stream close handler error during PHP shutdown; PHP lifecycle/implementation bug, not a spec violation.
Adding MongoDB version axis to CI matrix; build/test infrastructure, no spec involvement.
Adding PHP runtime axis to CI matrix; build/test infrastructure, no spec involvement.
CreateIndexes incorrectly sent 'ns' field in index spec; discovered via unified test runner strictness.
PHP 8 API refactor using get_debug_type; internal implementation improvement, no spec behavior change.
Updating release checklist for docs tickets; process/documentation, no spec involvement.
Internal cursor iteration cleanup using new ext-mongodb API; refactor with no behavior change.
CachingIterator validity check bug using null check instead of valid(); internal iterator logic bug.
Unified test runner failing tests never executed due to wrong method call; test runner bug fix.
Issue split from DRIVERS-812; adding Azure/GCP keystore support per FLE spec rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1437; estimatedDocumentCount spec change to use $collStats instead of count.
Implementing Versioned/Stable API for drivers; spec rollout improvement, not a pre-existing bug.
Unified test runner changes for Atlas testing; test infrastructure improvement, no driver behavior fix.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1577; workarounds for killAllSessions in unified test runner.
Workload executor for Atlas testing; test/CI infrastructure work, no spec behavior.
Resyncing transaction spec tests for unpinning after abort; issue split from DRIVERS-1655/1638/1685.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1591; clarifying runOn.minServerVersion behavior in test runner.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1649; renaming API field to match spec casing (acceptAPIVersion2 -> acceptApiVersion2).
Unified test runner missing isClientError assertion implementation; test runner bug, not driver behavior.
ListIndexes using wrong exception class for error catching; internal PHP implementation detail, no spec rule.
Issue split DRIVERS-1720; Stable API spec requires options passed to getMore and transaction-continuing commands.
Bug in unified test runner RunOnRequirement logic causing early return before all checks; test runner fix.
Syntax error in documentation example code; docs fix, no spec or driver behavior involved.
Issue split DRIVERS-1340; spec previously over-restricted hint with unacknowledged writes; driver fix to allow on supported servers.
Unified test runner isClientError check not unwrapping BulkWriteException; test runner logic bug.
isAcknowledgedWriteConcern() missed w=1 and string values; logic error in hint+unacknowledged-write guard.
Issue split DRIVERS-823; implementing $merge/$out on secondaries per spec rollout.
Allow GridFS StreamWrapper to throw instead of emit PHP warnings; simplifies test runner error detection.
CRUD spec states allowDiskUse must be unset by default; driver incorrectly defaulted it to false and sent it.
Issue split DRIVERS-1969; $out/$merge read preference in mixed-version cluster caused incorrect server selection error.
Issue split DRIVERS-1393; adding authorizedCollections option for listCollections per spec rollout.
Reference to undeclared variable in dead code path; implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
CachingIterator duplicate key overwrite bug; internal iterator data structure issue, no spec involvement.
Unified test runner should error on unexpected operation arguments; test runner robustness improvement.
